_comment: All weights, thresholds, recommended actions, crew time and closure logic live here — NOT in code (scope hard constraint). Tune freely without touching TS.

driverLabels.recentWorkorders: {n} reactive work orders in last 24 months

toll_gantry.red: Replace SunPass reader/antenna head; schedule in a planned reversal window to protect tolling uptime.
toll_gantry.amber: Bench-test reader electronics at next planned window; pre-order antenna spare.
toll_gantry.green: No action; next routine inspection on schedule.

access_gate.red: Replace gate actuator + limit switches; a stuck gate blocks the lane reversal.
access_gate.amber: Service actuator and lubricate; verify reversal interlock.

lane_control.red: Replace overhead lane-control signal driver board before a reversal failure forces a manual closure.
lane_control.amber: Inspect LED driver and comms; schedule with adjacent assets.

ramp_signal.red: Replace ramp meter controller; coordinate with FDOT during off-peak.

detector.red: Replace failing detector station; degraded counts skew variable-pricing inputs.

dms.red: Replace DMS power supply / pixel modules; dark sign during reversal is a safety gap.
dms.amber: Pixel test and supply check at next window.

cctv.red: Replace camera + encoder; restore corridor coverage for incident verification.
cctv.amber: Clean optics, check PTZ and stream health.

lighting.red: Replace luminaire driver(s); dark median segment elevates night crash risk.

controller_cabinet.red: Replace cabinet power/comms; cabinet outage takes a cluster of devices offline.

workPackage._comment: Used by the multi-select 'proactive work package' rollup. crewHoursEach = wrench time if each asset is done as its own emergency callout; sharedSetupHours is the one-time mobilization saved when bundled into a single planned window.
